All5 docs ok
Tip: You are using react-docgen (the default). Generation took 0.0s. For higher quality prop types, consider switching to react-docgen-typescript in your main.ts: 
typescript: {
  reactDocgen: 'react-docgen-typescript',
}
Note: react-docgen-typescript can be slower. If performance is acceptable for your project, it generally produces better results. Learn more

Unattached Docs

Tokens/Colors

tokens-colors--docs · ./stories/Colors.mdx
import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks';

<Meta title="Tokens/Colors" />

# Colors

The Atlas color palette.

export const Swatch = ({ name, hex }) => (
  <div style={{
    display: 'flex',
    alignItems: 'center',
    gap: '16px',
    padding: '12px 0',
    borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(15,15,15,0.06)',
  }}>
    <div style={{
      width: '48px',
      height: '48px',
      borderRadius: '8px',
      backgroundColor: hex,
      border: '1px solid rgba(15,15,15,0.08)',
      flexShrink: 0,
    }} />
    <div>
      <div style={{ fontWeight: 600, fontSize: '15px' }}>{name}</div>
      <code style={{ fontSize: '13px', color: 'rgba(15,15,15,0.5)' }}>{hex}</code>
    </div>
  </div>
);

## Accent

<Swatch name="Yellow" hex="#F6FF00" />
<Swatch name="Purple" hex="#9500FF" />
<Swatch name="Blue" hex="#00AAFF" />

## Surface

<Swatch name="Surface Light" hex="#F4F4F4" />
<Swatch name="Surface Dark" hex="#333333" />

## Text

<Swatch name="Text Primary" hex="#0F0F0F" />
<Swatch name="Text Light" hex="#FAFAFA" />

---

### Usage

```js
import { colors } from '@atlas/tokens';

// colors.yellow   → '#F6FF00'
// colors.purple   → '#9500FF'
// colors.blue     → '#00AAFF'
```

```css
:root {
  --yellow: #F6FF00;
  --purple: #9500FF;
  --blue: #00AAFF;
  --bg-surface: #F4F4F4;
  --bg-surface-dark: #333333;
  --text-primary: #0F0F0F;
  --text-light: #FAFAFA;
}
```

Assets/Flags

assets-flags--docs · ./stories/Flags.mdx
import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks';

<Meta title="Assets/Flags" />

# Flags

271 SVG country flags in two aspect ratios, named by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

export const Flag = ({ code, name }) => (
  <div style={{
    display: 'inline-flex',
    flexDirection: 'column',
    alignItems: 'center',
    gap: '6px',
    padding: '12px',
    borderRadius: '8px',
    width: '90px',
    textAlign: 'center',
  }}>
    <img
      src={`https://tickertapenews.github.io/atlas/flags/4x3/${code}.svg`}
      alt={name}
      style={{ width: '48px', height: '36px', borderRadius: '3px', border: '1px solid rgba(15,15,15,0.08)' }}
    />
    <div style={{ fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 600 }}>{code.toUpperCase()}</div>
    <div style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: 'rgba(15,15,15,0.45)' }}>{name}</div>
  </div>
);

## Nordic

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '4px' }}>
  <Flag code="se" name="Sverige" />
  <Flag code="no" name="Norge" />
  <Flag code="dk" name="Danmark" />
  <Flag code="fi" name="Finland" />
  <Flag code="is" name="Island" />
</div>

## Europe

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '4px' }}>
  <Flag code="gb" name="UK" />
  <Flag code="de" name="Tyskland" />
  <Flag code="fr" name="Frankrike" />
  <Flag code="nl" name="Nederländerna" />
  <Flag code="ch" name="Schweiz" />
  <Flag code="it" name="Italien" />
  <Flag code="es" name="Spanien" />
  <Flag code="pt" name="Portugal" />
  <Flag code="at" name="Österrike" />
  <Flag code="be" name="Belgien" />
  <Flag code="ie" name="Irland" />
  <Flag code="pl" name="Polen" />
  <Flag code="eu" name="EU" />
</div>

## Americas

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '4px' }}>
  <Flag code="us" name="USA" />
  <Flag code="ca" name="Kanada" />
  <Flag code="br" name="Brasilien" />
  <Flag code="mx" name="Mexiko" />
  <Flag code="ar" name="Argentina" />
</div>

## Asia & Pacific

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '4px' }}>
  <Flag code="jp" name="Japan" />
  <Flag code="cn" name="Kina" />
  <Flag code="kr" name="Sydkorea" />
  <Flag code="in" name="Indien" />
  <Flag code="au" name="Australien" />
  <Flag code="sg" name="Singapore" />
  <Flag code="hk" name="Hongkong" />
  <Flag code="tw" name="Taiwan" />
</div>

---

### Formats

| Aspect | Path | Use case |
|--------|------|----------|
| 4:3 | `/flags/4x3/{code}.svg` | Standard flag |
| 1:1 | `/flags/1x1/{code}.svg` | Icons, avatars |

### Usage

```html
<img src="https://tickertapenews.github.io/atlas/flags/4x3/se.svg" alt="SE" width="24">
```

Assets/Icons

assets-icons--docs · ./stories/Icons.mdx
import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks';

<Meta title="Assets/Icons" />

# Icons

1,383 regular + 288 solid SVG icons from [Iconoir](https://iconoir.com) (v7.11, MIT license).

export const Icon = ({ name, style = 'regular' }) => (
  <div style={{
    display: 'inline-flex',
    flexDirection: 'column',
    alignItems: 'center',
    gap: '6px',
    padding: '12px 8px',
    width: '100px',
    textAlign: 'center',
    borderRadius: '6px',
    cursor: 'default',
  }}>
    <img
      src={`https://tickertapenews.github.io/atlas/icons/${style}/${name}.svg`}
      alt={name}
      style={{ width: '24px', height: '24px' }}
    />
    <span style={{ fontSize: '10px', color: 'rgba(15,15,15,0.45)', wordBreak: 'break-all', lineHeight: 1.3 }}>{name}</span>
  </div>
);

## Navigation

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '2px' }}>
  <Icon name="arrow-left" />
  <Icon name="arrow-right" />
  <Icon name="arrow-up" />
  <Icon name="arrow-down" />
  <Icon name="arrow-up-right" />
  <Icon name="home" />
  <Icon name="home-simple" />
  <Icon name="search" />
  <Icon name="filter" />
  <Icon name="filter-list" />
  <Icon name="share-ios" />
  <Icon name="bookmark" />
</div>

## Actions

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '2px' }}>
  <Icon name="plus" />
  <Icon name="minus" />
  <Icon name="check" />
  <Icon name="check-circle" />
  <Icon name="edit" />
  <Icon name="edit-pencil" />
  <Icon name="trash" />
  <Icon name="download" />
  <Icon name="upload" />
  <Icon name="eye" />
  <Icon name="eye-closed" />
  <Icon name="lock" />
</div>

## Communication

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '2px' }}>
  <Icon name="mail" />
  <Icon name="mail-open" />
  <Icon name="bell" />
  <Icon name="bell-notification" />
  <Icon name="bell-off" />
</div>

## User

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '2px' }}>
  <Icon name="user" />
  <Icon name="user-circle" />
  <Icon name="user-plus" />
  <Icon name="user-star" />
  <Icon name="user-badge-check" />
</div>

## Finance

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '2px' }}>
  <Icon name="dollar" />
  <Icon name="dollar-circle" />
  <Icon name="euro" />
  <Icon name="graph-up" />
  <Icon name="graph-down" />
  <Icon name="chart-line" />
  <Icon name="stats-up-square" />
  <Icon name="stats-down-square" />
</div>

## Time

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '2px' }}>
  <Icon name="clock" />
  <Icon name="calendar" />
  <Icon name="calendar-check" />
  <Icon name="calendar-plus" />
</div>

## Media

<div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '2px' }}>
  <Icon name="star" />
  <Icon name="heart" />
  <Icon name="settings" />
  <Icon name="airplay" />
</div>

---

### Formats

| Style | Count | Path |
|-------|-------|------|
| Regular (outline) | 1,383 | `/icons/regular/{name}.svg` |
| Solid (filled) | 288 | `/icons/solid/{name}.svg` |

### Usage

```html
<!-- Regular -->
<img src="https://tickertapenews.github.io/atlas/icons/regular/search.svg" width="24" height="24">

<!-- Solid -->
<img src="https://tickertapenews.github.io/atlas/icons/solid/heart.svg" width="24" height="24">
```

### Browse all icons

See the full catalogue at [iconoir.com](https://iconoir.com). All icons are hosted at `/icons/regular/{name}.svg` using the same filenames.

Introduction

introduction--docs · ./stories/Introduction.mdx
import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks';

<Meta title="Introduction" />

# Atlas Design System

The shared design system for **Ticker Tape News** and **The Desk**.

Atlas centralizes components, design tokens, and assets so both projects stay visually consistent.

---

### What's inside

| Section | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Colors** | Brand palette and surface colors |
| **Typography** | Figtree font family and scale |
| **Flags** | 271 SVG country flags in 4:3 and 1:1 |

---

### Quick start

Install Figtree and reference Atlas tokens:

```html
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Figtree:ital,wght@0,300..900;1,300..900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
```

Flag usage:

```html
<img src="https://tickertapenews.github.io/atlas/flags/4x3/se.svg" alt="SE" width="24">
```

Tokens/Typography

tokens-typography--docs · ./stories/Typography.mdx
import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks';

<Meta title="Tokens/Typography" />

# Typography

Atlas uses **Figtree** — a variable Google Font supporting weights 300–900 with italic.

export const Sample = ({ weight, size, label }) => (
  <div style={{
    fontFamily: '"Figtree", sans-serif',
    fontWeight: weight,
    fontSize: size || '24px',
    padding: '12px 0',
    borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(15,15,15,0.06)',
    display: 'flex',
    alignItems: 'baseline',
    gap: '16px',
  }}>
    <span style={{ minWidth: '60px', fontSize: '13px', color: 'rgba(15,15,15,0.4)', fontWeight: 400 }}>{label}</span>
    <span>The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog</span>
  </div>
);

## Weights

<Sample weight={300} label="300" />
<Sample weight={400} label="400" />
<Sample weight={500} label="500" />
<Sample weight={600} label="600" />
<Sample weight={700} label="700" />
<Sample weight={800} label="800" />
<Sample weight={900} label="900" />

## Scale

export const ScaleSample = ({ size, label }) => (
  <div style={{
    fontFamily: '"Figtree", sans-serif',
    fontSize: size,
    fontWeight: 500,
    padding: '8px 0',
    borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(15,15,15,0.06)',
    display: 'flex',
    alignItems: 'baseline',
    gap: '16px',
  }}>
    <code style={{ minWidth: '80px', fontSize: '13px', color: 'rgba(15,15,15,0.4)', fontWeight: 400 }}>{label}</code>
    <span>Ticker Tape News</span>
  </div>
);

<ScaleSample size="12px" label="12px" />
<ScaleSample size="14px" label="14px" />
<ScaleSample size="16px" label="16px" />
<ScaleSample size="20px" label="20px" />
<ScaleSample size="24px" label="24px" />
<ScaleSample size="32px" label="32px" />
<ScaleSample size="48px" label="48px" />

---

### Load font

```html
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Figtree:ital,wght@0,300..900;1,300..900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
```

```css
body {
  font-family: 'Figtree', sans-serif;
}
```
